summary: Comprehensive testing of CalmTails e-commerce pet wellness store - new animal categories (birds, rabbits, fish, small pets), icon replacements, and royalty-free images. All requested features working correctly.
passed_tests: Products endpoint returns 23 products as expected
Bird filter (/api/products?pet_type=bird) returns 3 bird products correctly
Rabbit filter (/api/products?pet_type=rabbit) returns 3 rabbit products correctly
Fish filter (/api/products?pet_type=fish) returns 3 fish products correctly
Small pet filter (/api/products?pet_type=small_pet) returns 3 small pet products correctly
Reptile filter (/api/products?pet_type=reptile) returns 3 reptile products - correctly excludes 'both' type
Dog filter (/api/products?pet_type=dog) returns 6 products (4 dog + 2 'both') correctly
Cat filter (/api/products?pet_type=cat) returns 4 products (2 cat + 2 'both') correctly
Homepage shows 8 categories with proper SVG icons (Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets, Calming Beds, Supplements)
Navigation bar shows all 7 animal type links (Shop All, Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets)
Products page has all 7 filter buttons with unique colors (Dogs, Cats, Birds, Fish, Rabbits, Small Pets, Reptiles)
Filter buttons work correctly - clicking Dogs shows 6 products, clicking Birds shows 3 products
All 23 product images load from Unsplash (royalty-free)
Add to cart functionality works - product added and cart drawer opens
Cart shows correct product image, name, price, and quantity controls
Featured products endpoint returns up to 8 products
seed_data_creation: 23 products seeded covering 7 pet types: dog (4), cat (2), both (2), reptile (3), bird (3), rabbit (3), fish (3), small_pet (3)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new animal categories (birds, rabbits, fish, small pets) are fully implemented and tested. The 'both' category correctly appears only in dog and cat filters. All product images are royalty-free from Unsplash. Icons are properly implemented using lucide-react SVG icons (Dog, Cat, Bird, Fish, Rabbit, Squirrel for small pets, Bed for calming beds, Pill for supplements). Filter logic in backend/server.py line 340-343 correctly handles the 'both' exclusion for reptile/bird/rabbit/fish/small_pet filters.
verification_screenshots: .screenshots/products_page_filters.png - Products page with all filter buttons
